'''ân-j-g''' ('''kanajag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jebait|jebait]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jebait|jebait]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-j-g
|-
! Lemma
| kanajag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinajag|thinajag]] || [[word:jinajag|jinajag]] || [[word:shinajag|shinajag]] || [[word:kinajag|kinajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunajag|thuthunajag]] || [[word:jujunajag|jujunajag]] || [[word:shushunajag|shushunajag]] || [[word:kukunajag|kukunajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunajag|thunajag]] || [[word:junajag|junajag]] || [[word:shunajag|shunajag]] || [[word:kunajag|kunajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunajag|thunajag]] || [[word:junajag|junajag]] || [[word:shunajag|shunajag]] || [[word:kunajag|kunajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenajag|thenajag]] || [[word:jenajag|jenajag]] || [[word:shenajag|shenajag]] || [[word:kenajag|kenajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonajag|thothonajag]] || [[word:jojonajag|jojonajag]] || [[word:shoshonajag|shoshonajag]] || [[word:kokonajag|kokonajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonajag|thonajag]] || [[word:jonajag|jonajag]] || [[word:shonajag|shonajag]] || [[word:konajag|konajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonajag|thonajag]] || [[word:jonajag|jonajag]] || [[word:shonajag|shonajag]] || [[word:konajag|konajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnajag|thĂŠnajag]] || [[word:jĂŠnajag|jĂŠnajag]] || [[word:shĂŠnajag|shĂŠnajag]] || [[word:kĂŠnajag|kĂŠnajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanajag|thathanajag]] || [[word:jajanajag|jajanajag]] || [[word:shashanajag|shashanajag]] || [[word:kakanajag|kakanajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanajag|thanajag]] || [[word:janajag|janajag]] || [[word:shanajag|shanajag]] || [[word:kanajag|kanajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanajag|thanajag]] || [[word:janajag|janajag]] || [[word:shanajag|shanajag]] || [[word:kanajag|kanajag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanajag|shanajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanajag|goshanajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanajag|gokishanajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanajagnĂŒ|shanajagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanajagnknĂŒ|goshanajagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanajagnĂŒ|gokishanajagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanajagshĂ«|shanajagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanajagnkshĂ«|goshanajagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanajagshĂ«|gokishanajagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanajagro|shanajagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanajagnkro|goshanajagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanajagro|gokishanajagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanajagmu|shanajagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanajagnkmu|goshanajagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanajagmu|gokishanajagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanajagsher|shanajagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanajagnksher|goshanajagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanajagsher|gokishanajagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanajagng|shanajagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanajagnkng|goshanajagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanajagng|gokishanajagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanajagya|shanajagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanajagnkya|goshanajagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanajagya|gokishanajagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanajagyam|shanajagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanajagnkyam|goshanajagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanajagyam|gokishanajagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanajagnĂŒshĂ«|shanajagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanajagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanajagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanajagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanajagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanajagnĂŒro|shanajagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanajagnknĂŒro|goshanajagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanajagnĂŒro|gokishanajagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanajagnĂŒmu|shanajagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanajagnknĂŒmu|goshanajagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanajagnĂŒmu|gokishanajagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanajagshĂ«nĂŒ|shanajagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanajagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanajagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanajagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanajagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanajagshĂ«ro|shanajagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanajagnkshĂ«ro|goshanajagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanajagshĂ«ro|gokishanajagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanajagshĂ«mu|shanajagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanajagnkshĂ«mu|goshanajagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanajagshĂ«mu|gokishanajagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanajagronĂŒ|shanajagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanajagnkronĂŒ|goshanajagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanajagronĂŒ|gokishanajagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanajagroshĂ«|shanajagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanajagnkroshĂ«|goshanajagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanajagroshĂ«|gokishanajagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanajagromu|shanajagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanajagnkromu|goshanajagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanajagromu|gokishanajagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanajagmunĂŒ|shanajagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanajagnkmunĂŒ|goshanajagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanajagmunĂŒ|gokishanajagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanajagmushĂ«|shanajagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanajagnkmushĂ«|goshanajagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanajagmushĂ«|gokishanajagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanajagmuro|shanajagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanajagnkmuro|goshanajagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanajagmuro|gokishanajagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
